title: Environment label
description: Where a node/measurement lives. Carried on every measurement so a container/WSL2 wall is never mistaken for a bare-metal wall. wall_source records HOW the memory ceiling was read.

virtualization_layer.description: e.g. wsl2, docker, none/null when bare-metal host

wall_source.description: cgroup = read from cgroup memory.max/limit (container-honest); physical = detected host RAM/VRAM
